factors.rationale: The product is the single dominant focal point and fills enough of the frame to identify instantly.
The product is isolated with no useful context or only a generic marketplace presentation.
A specific benefit is clear, such as being Fair Trade Certified.
The eye path is obvious, text is readable, and supporting elements do not distract.
Texture and finish of the product are clearly visible.
The Fair Trade Certified logo provides a credible trust signal.
Strong contrast and legible text make the creative readable.
The image has clear campaign intent with explicit ad copy and a narrative tied to the product benefit.
